power_text: Clone: Play when denomination matches last played. Reverse: Toggle play direction.
Count your hand, move hand to discard, draw the same number of cards from your deck.
Draw 3 cards from your deck, then place 2 cards from your hand under your draw deck.
Both you and target reveal top 3 of draw decks. Higher total wins all 6 cards under their play pile; loser discards.
Count your hand, move hand to discard, draw the same number of cards from your deck.
For each Discard card in opponents' play piles, reveal top of their draw deck. Choose one to score; all revealed go to owners' hands.
Both you and target reveal top 3 of draw decks. Higher total wins all 6 cards under their play pile; loser discards.
Clone: Play when denomination matches last played. Skip: Skip the next player's turn.
Recycle: Shuffle target's discard into their draw deck. Reverse: Toggle play direction.
Name a power. That power cannot be activated until the end of your next turn.
Draw 3 cards from your deck, then place 2 cards from your hand under your draw deck.
At end of round, your hand is shuffled into your draw deck instead of your discard pile.
This card is worth 40,000 points instead of 10,000 for the round winner.
For each Discard card in opponents' play piles, reveal top of their draw deck. Choose one to score; all revealed go to owners' hands.
Count your play pile, shuffle it into your deck, then move the same number of cards from deck to play pile.
At end of round, your hand is shuffled into your draw deck instead of your discard pile.
When any player scores points from a card, half goes to the scorer and half goes to the Tally card owner.
